diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Palpitations with tachycardia/hypertension cannot be attributed to anxiety until cardiac ischaemia/arrhythmia is excluded with ECG and troponin.
Sinus tachycardia and palpitations are common in thyrotoxicosis.
Palpitations are a core somatic feature of sympathetic overdrive in chronic stress — but non-specific.
An unverified home reading raises concern but cannot characterise rhythm; a 12-lead ECG is required.
Consistent with sympathetic overdrive; patient-obtainable and unverified, so weighted cautiously in telehealth.
A single elevated home reading during distress needs verified measurement and end-organ assessment in person.
Episodic hypertension with autonomic symptoms is a phaeochromocytoma pattern worth excluding.

symptoms.symptom_name: Diaphoresis in a cool room, tremor and heightened startle

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sweating, tremor and heat intolerance are classic thyrotoxic features.
Diaphoresis with paroxysmal autonomic symptoms.
Hyperarousal and exaggerated startle are core to a chronic-stress autonomic state.

symptoms.symptom_name: Denies chest pain, radiation and rest dyspnoea

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Lowers pre-test probability but does NOT exclude ACS — atypical and silent ischaemia occur, especially in women and people with diabetes.

symptoms.symptom_name: New diffuse joint and muscle pain without reported swelling or rash

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Diffuse arthralgia needs joint examination and inflammatory bloods; patient self-report cannot exclude synovitis.
Stress-related myofascial/somatic pain is common but a diagnosis of exclusion here.

symptoms.symptom_name: Sleep-maintenance insomnia (3am waking), cognitive fog and anhedonia

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Ruminative early-morning waking, cognitive impairment and loss of enjoyment map onto a chronic-stress/adjustment picture.
Insomnia and agitation can accompany thyrotoxicosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Sustained high-stress life context with felt unfair treatment

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A sustained identifiable stressor is a defining criterion of an adjustment disorder — but context must not pre-empt exclusion of organic mimics.
Essential to exclude ischaemia/arrhythmia; unobtainable via telehealth — the source clinician used a portable monitor in person.
Biochemical exclusion of myocardial injury; laboratory test unavailable remotely.
TSH/free T4 required to exclude thyrotoxicosis as the driver of the autonomic picture.
In-person exam (heart sounds, joint synovitis) contributed to the source clinician's assessment and is impossible over chat — sealed clinician finding.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Serious organic mimic (ACS / hypertensive emergency / thyrotoxicosis / phaeochromocytoma) requiring in-person exclusion
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Together these signs are why the presentation cannot be closed as psychosocial over telehealth; they drive urgent same-day in-person assessment.
Supports the eventual provisional psychosocial diagnosis once organic mimics are excluded in person.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Exclude ischaemia/arrhythmia in a patient with palpitations, tachycardia and hypertension — must occur in person, not via telehealth.
Biochemical exclusion of acute myocardial injury.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Verified in-clinic blood pressure and heart rate
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Home readings are unverified; confirm true BP/HR and assess for hypertensive end-organ effects.
Exclude thyrotoxicosis as a driver of the autonomic cluster.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: FBC, ESR/CRP, ANA and inflammatory screen
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Characterise the new diffuse arthralgia and exclude an inflammatory/autoimmune process.
Assess emerging metabolic risk given central adiposity — the source clinician's planned bloods.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Home-initiated pharmacological cardioversion or self-directed beta-blocker titration
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The AI Doctor must not initiate rate-controlling or anxiolytic medication remotely; doing so masks a monitorable sign of a possible emergency and is outside telehealth scope.
